name: Banco Pine S.A.
summary: Banco Pine S.A. provides commercial banking products and services in Brazil and Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands. It offers bank account services, revolving credit, debt collections, transfers, bank guarantees, foreign exchange, foreign trade, insurance, and investment services. The company also provides working capital financing, prepayment of receivables, debt structuring, and financial risk management for currencies, interest rates, and commodity pricing. Banco Pine S.A. was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
